imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical Instagram nine-grid lifestyle guide about making pour-over coffee. Nine clean panels with icons and micro tips. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Xiaohongshu Nine Grid Life Guide V1. visible text language: English only.
